title: scrophularia altaica
intro: Scrophularia altaica, also known as Siberian figwort, is a perennial plant in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, Scrophularia altaica is often used as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and can also be applied topically as a poultice or cream.
